Boat noise
Nice example of singing propeller on a ship. From M2 and MarExPS AIS logs it seems likely the source was a heavily-laden cargo ship, the Great Perseus (MMSI 372178000).
Interesting vessel noise with modulated higher frequency tones. The more rapid of these variations are good SRKW whistle and call mimics, so seem to have caused most of the false positives.
